name: Classic bad cold email — stacks every common failure
draft:
Hi Sarah,

I hope this email finds you well. My name is Alex Kalyvas — I'm a Stanford MBA student passionate about AI products. I'm currently working at the intersection of AI and enterprise software, leveraging cutting-edge models to drive impactful outcomes.

I would love to pick your brain over a coffee to delve into how you navigate the complexities of building robust AI solutions. Your work on agentic systems is truly inspiring and I'd love to learn more.

I'm very flexible — happy to chat whenever works for you.

Best,
Alex

expected_flags.quote_contains: I hope this email finds you well
